generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced my existing support for strategic autonomy by highlighting a concrete example of the risks of over-reliance on foreign tech. The mention of compromised infrastructure resonated with my concerns about national security.

Just look at what happened with [Allied Nation] - their critical infrastructure was compromised because they didn't prioritize domestic innovation. We can't afford to make the same mistake. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
